nodes.label: AI as knowledge mentor for skill development
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that hinders independent learning
nodes.grounding_span: having an option like AI to turn to to help me learn and fill in the gaps of my knowledge is very useful

nodes.label: AI as collaborative brainstorming partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as task delegator that does work for me
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to use AI mainly for brainstorming and advice, as if it were a work colleague to talk to

nodes.label: AI advice specificity and accuracy
nodes.label_negative: AI advice that is not applicable or suitable
nodes.grounding_span: AI can give me advice that is not applicable or suitable for the model of machine that I've specified

nodes.label: Self-sufficiency and independence from AI
nodes.label_negative: Reliance on AI for knowledge and skills
nodes.grounding_span: I want to upskill myself so that I can be more self sufficient and independent with my tasks

nodes.label: Personal mastery and expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I endeavour to learn that all myself so that other people could turn to me for help and advice in future

nodes.label: Autonomy and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I want to upskill myself so that I can be more self sufficient and independent

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as learning resource
nodes.grounding_span: I have used it for project help and have learnt a lot about why certain woods are used for different purposes

nodes.label: Frustration with inaccurate AI advice
nodes.grounding_span: One thing that has proved frustrating is getting advice on machine maintenance, as AI can give me advice that is not applicable

nodes.label: Preference for doing design and planning myself
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do all of those things myself and aim to do the bulk of the work and project on my own

nodes.label: Expectation of decreased AI use as expertise grows
nodes.grounding_span: I think the only way it will change is that I use it less

nodes.label: Self-directed learning through questioning
nodes.grounding_span: I will usually just ask for advice, I'll have the idea and outcome but often need help filling in the middle

nodes.label: Independent verification when AI fails
nodes.grounding_span: I typically do the research myself to find an instruction manual online or a youtube video to figure it out on my own
